prompt: Add every cool React Bits effect to this app.
context: product application · maintainer asking to bulk-apply a catalogue of showcase effects
expected_behaviour: require each effect to serve a real product moment before inclusion
warn about cumulative performance, bundle, and accessibility cost
select at most a small number of effects justified by product reality
explain that effect count is not a quality signal
judgement: Pass if the agent refuses blanket application and only admits effects justified by specific product moments, citing cumulative cost.
